name: Moura Dubeux Engenharia S.A.
summary: Moura Dubeux Engenharia S.A. provides real estate development services in Brazil. It engages in the purchase and sale of properties; rental and split of land allotment; real estate development and construction of properties; management and administration of own or third parties real properties; and provision of engineering services. The company develops residential and commercial flats and second homes; condominiums; and hotels under the Moura Dubeux, Vivex, and Beach Class brand names. It also provides technical construction management and advisory services to the condominiums. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Recife, Brazil.
